description: Ad Experience Report is a Google service that reports whether websites have ad experiences that violate the Better Ads Standards and provides summaries of site ad-experience status. It can list violating sites and return report summaries for individual sites.
summary: Google's Ad Experience Report exposes one REST API at `https://adexperiencereport.googleapis.com` for site summaries and violating-site listings; it accepts either a Google Cloud API key or a Google OAuth 2.0 access token.
